title: Accountants & Bookkeepers
metaTitle: Accounting & Bookkeeping Software for Accountants · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Double-entry books, VAT returns, financial reports and multi-client workspaces for accountants and bookkeepers. Clean ledgers, any currency, any tax rate. Worldwide.
keywords: accounting software for accountants, bookkeeping software, double entry accounting, vat return software, financial reports, multi client bookkeeping, trial balance
heroTitle: Clean books that always reconcile
heroSubtitle: Real double-entry accounting, automatic postings from every invoice and payment, VAT returns and reports your clients can trust. Paper & Pen does the bookkeeping so you can do the advising.

features.title: VAT returns

sections.title: The ledger writes itself
sections.body: Manual journals are where errors creep in. In Paper & Pen, every invoice, payment, purchase and stock movement posts a balanced double-entry journal to a proper chart of accounts, so the books are always live and always reconciled. You spend your time reviewing and advising, not typing entries, and every figure traces straight back to its source document.
items: Full audit trail to source documents

sections.title: VAT, statements and reports on demand
sections.body: Pull a profit and loss, balance sheet, trial balance or general ledger whenever a client asks, and produce a VAT return with tax tracked on every document. Paper & Pen handles 5% GCC VAT out of the box and any tax rate or currency for clients elsewhere, so you can serve a portfolio across markets. Built in Oman, comfortable everywhere from Muscat to Manchester.
items: P&L, balance sheet, trial balance, ledgers
VAT tracked per document, ready to file

faqs.a: Yes. Every transaction posts a balanced journal entry to a proper chart of accounts, so the trial balance always balances and the books reconcile.

faqs.q: Do invoices and payments post automatically?
faqs.a: Yes. Sales, purchases, payments and stock movements post to the ledger automatically, so there is nothing to re-key and far less room for error.
Yes. Tax is tracked on every document, so you can produce a 5% GCC VAT return or a return at any rate for clients in other tax regimes.
Profit and loss, balance sheet, trial balance, general ledger and customer or supplier statements, all on demand and traceable to source documents.

faqs.q: Can I handle clients in different currencies?
faqs.a: Yes. Paper & Pen handles multi-currency clients and any tax regime, so you can serve a portfolio across countries from one platform.

ctaTitle: Spend less time keying, more time advising
ctaSub: Let Paper & Pen post the ledgers automatically so your books reconcile and your reports are ready on demand.
